BOLT PATTERN INCORRECT in batch data. 1980-1988 Caprice uses 5x120.65 (5x4.75), NOT 5x127. The 5x127 (5x5) pattern was introduced in 1991 B-body redesign. Hub bore is also 70.3mm not 78.1mm.

Z51 package did not exist in 1969. Z51 was introduced in 1973 as 'Off Road Suspension'. Valid trims for 1969: Base, L88.
1986 Base had 16x8.5 wheels with P255/50VR16 tires (confirmed). Current data shows staggered 17" wheels which were NOT available in 1986 - ZR-1 wasn't introduced until 1990.
1987 Base had 16x8.5 wheels with P255/50VR16 tires. Current data shows staggered 17" wheels which were NOT available in 1987.
1988 Base had 16x8.5 wheels with P255/50ZR16 tires. Current data shows staggered 17" wheels which were NOT standard on Base - those were Z51/Z52 only.
1989 Base had 16x8.5 or 17x9.5 wheels depending on options. Current data shows staggered setup which was NOT available on Base models in 1989.
1990 Base had 17x9.5 square setup with P275/40ZR17 tires. Current data shows staggered setup (17x9.5/17x12) which is ZR-1 spec, NOT Base.
1991 Base had 17x9.5 square setup with P275/40ZR17 tires. Current data shows staggered setup which is ZR-1 spec, NOT Base.
1992 Base had 17x9.5 square setup with P275/40ZR17 tires. Current data shows staggered setup which is ZR-1 spec, NOT Base.
1993 Base changed to staggered setup: 17x8.5 front / 17x9.5 rear with P255/45ZR17 front / P285/40ZR17 rear. Current data shows wrong staggered dimensions (17x9.5/17x12).
Z51 was not offered in 1993. Replaced by Z07 package for that year. Z51 returned in 1994.
Z52 was discontinued after 1992. Not available in 1993. Z07 replaced handling packages.
1994 Base had staggered setup: 17x8.5 front / 17x9.5 rear with P255/45ZR17 front / P285/40ZR17 rear. Current data shows wrong dimensions.
1995 Base had staggered setup: 17x8.5 front / 17x9.5 rear. Current data shows wrong dimensions.
